metadata.description: This person appears to be a male in their 40s, with olive skin tone showing some fine lines around the eyes. Their face is oval with a defined jawline, and they have dark brown, wavy hair pulled back into a low bun, with a receding hairline at the temples. The eyes are almond-shaped and a striking amber color, set with thick, dark, arched eyebrows. The nose is prominent with a straight bridge and a slightly rounded tip, and the lips are medium thickness with a natural, relaxed curve. A full beard and mustache, dark brown with noticeable graying, covers the lower face. The person is looking slightly upwards and to the right, with a calm expression, their head angled slightly to the left.
